---
title: "R training"
author: "Karissa Willits"
date: 2026-03-18 
format: html
editor: visual
---

I am learning R! Don't need # when using chunks

```{r}
#use # when leaving notes in the code
# i dont know what ``` is for
#ctr enter just runs that line of code.
```


```{r}
3 #this will get just printed
4
typeof(8.5) #this is returning a function . returns the data type
#console important for tracking what happened. trying ot troubleshoot, look in the console. most of code writing want to be within a code file so its saved. 
```
```{r}
"text strings are fun"
```
